summary: PRC Usage History Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend API (13/13 tests) and Frontend UI (all components verified) working correctly. Feature allows users to view date-wise PRC usage history with narrations and monthly graph from joining date.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PRC Usage History feature fully tested and working. Backend API at /api/prc-statement/usage-history/{uid} returns correct JSON with success, summary (total_used, total_transactions, months_active, by_type), graph_data (monthly breakdown), and daily_breakdown (expandable entries). Frontend route /usage-history renders PRCUsageHistory component with all required data-testid attributes. Dashboard 'Used >' link (data-testid='used-prc-link') navigates correctly. Route protection redirects to /login when not authenticated.

response_structure.graph_data: array of monthly data with month, total, count, types
response_structure.daily_breakdown: array of daily entries with date, total, entries[]

backend_api.calculation_accuracy: VERIFIED - total_used matches sum of daily totals

frontend_route.route_protection: VERIFIED - redirects to /login when not authenticated

frontend_test_results.dashboard_loads: PASS - Shows user balance and Elite plan
frontend_test_results.type_breakdown_display: PASS - Shows Subscription and Burn categories
frontend_test_results.monthly_chart_renders: PASS - Recharts bar chart with Mar/Apr data
frontend_test_results.day_expand_collapse: PASS - Clicking day row expands/collapses entries
frontend_test_results.route_protection: PASS - Redirects to /login when not authenticated
